title: Exciting new golf challenge for Plettenberg Bay
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEW - The pros have the Race...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEW - The pros have the Race to Dubai.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEW - The pros have the Race to Dubai."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Now, local amateurs have the Race to Plettenberg Bay!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Goose Valley Golf Club is set to start the inaugural Race to Plettenberg Bay, a golf competition for amateurs that will mirror the famous Race to Dubai challenge.","html":"Goose Valley Golf Club is set to start the inaugural Race to Plettenberg Bay, a golf competition for amateurs that will mirror the famous Race to Dubai challenge."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Club captain Simon Mottershead says the competition, to run during the season, from April until the end of November, will be known as the Goose Valley Cup."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"After taking part in the Windhoek pairs competition in 2023, winning our way through to Portugal for the world finals and managing to secure a world title with my now fiancée, Gina Woolley, I thought we amateur golfers need something to get the juices flowing on a more regular basis,\" said Mottershead. \"This is where the inspiration for the competition came from.\"","html":"\"After taking part in the Windhoek pairs competition in 2023, winning our way through to Portugal for the world finals and managing to secure a world title with my now fiancée, Gina Woolley, I thought we amateur golfers need something to get the juices flowing on a more regular basis,\" said Mottershead. \"This is where the inspiration for the competition came from.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The competition will be open to all amateur golfers in the Garden Route and will be run on a league points system. \"Looking at the calendar, there should be provision for about 20 to 25 events to be held throughout the eight-month season.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The competition will be held every available Sunday and is open from the first tee-off, usually about 13:30 to 14:00, until the last tee time by which a scorecard can still be handed in at the Pro Shop before it closes at 17:00.","html":"The competition will be held every available Sunday and is open from the first tee-off, usually about 13:30 to 14:00, until the last tee time by which a scorecard can still be handed in at the Pro Shop before it closes at 17:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You may enter as a two-ball, three-ball or four-ball, as long as there is someone to mark your card. Only players with official HNA handicaps will be allowed to take part.","html":"You may enter as a two-ball, three-ball or four-ball, as long as there is someone to mark your card. Only players with official HNA handicaps will be allowed to take part."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The competition format will be individual Stableford, and points will be awarded: from 20 points for first place to one point for 20th place."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Throughout the season, a leader board will be posted, and a player's top 15 results will be used to calculate finishing positions. This will limit the penalty for missing some of the events.","html":"Throughout the season, a leader board will be posted, and a player's top 15 results will be used to calculate finishing positions. This will limit the penalty for missing some of the events."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the end of the season, the top eight players will go into the final round of play-offs, which will be held at the beginning of December, for a chance to win the coveted Goose Valley Cup, and over R10 000 worth of prize money for the top three.","html":"At the end of the season, the top eight players will go into the final round of play-offs, which will be held at the beginning of December, for a chance to win the coveted Goose Valley Cup, and over R10 000 worth of prize money for the top three."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We have obtained local sponsorship from Buco Plett and Slops Restaurant for the main event, and closest-to-the-pin prizes respectively on each competition day,\" said Mottershead.","html":"\"We have obtained local sponsorship from Buco Plett and Slops Restaurant for the main event, and closest-to-the-pin prizes respectively on each competition day,\" said Mottershead."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The entry fee will be R50 per player, on top of the usual green fees."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A prize pool for the day will be generated from all the players' entry fees on the day. Winners will be notified via social media (there will not be a prize-giving), and any winnings can be collected at the Pro Shop at Goose Valley.","html":"A prize pool for the day will be generated from all the players' entry fees on the day. Winners will be notified via social media (there will not be a prize-giving), and any winnings can be collected at the Pro Shop at Goose Valley."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone interested should contact the Goose Valley Pro Shop on 044 533 5082, or visit the Goose Valley Golf Club's Facebook page for more information and bookings.","html":"Anyone interested should contact the Goose Valley Pro Shop on 044 533 5082, or visit the Goose Valley Golf Club's Facebook page for more information and bookings."}]

images.alt: Exciting new golf challenge for Plettenberg Bay
